title: Template Literal Router

statement.markdown:
Create a simple template literal router that maps URLs to templates.
## Template Literal Router
## Requirements
1. Create a function called `createRouter` that returns an object with the following properties:
- `get`: a function that takes a URL as a template literal and returns the rendered template string
- `post`: a function that takes a URL as a template literal and returns the rendered template string

constraints: The `createRouter` function should be reusable, i.e. it should not require any external dependencies or variables
The `createRouter` function should handle multiple routes (not just a single one)
